creator: zeising@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to daniel from comment #12)

It looks like it's not using VESA, rather using either the amdgpu driver or something on the framebuffer.  It's using the modesetting xorg driver at least.  perhaps this is the difference between your config, and the original PR submitter's config.

Can you provide output from glxinfo as well?
Thanks!
